subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath turned his face unto the countenance of Thy singleness and sought shelter beneath the canopy of Thy glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی توجه الی وجهه فردانیتک و آوی الی کنف عز
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
